#+TITLE: Vendored Runtime Package Receipts
#+DATE: 2026-07-19
#+AUTHOR: tao3k
#+FILETAGS: :org-zhixing:packages:runtime:receipts:

* Scope
These immutable npm package artifacts keep the standalone org-zhixing-themes
checkout reproducible while the corresponding packages await registry releases.
They are consumed through package.json and package-lock.json; application code
must never address files inside the archives or node_modules directly.

* Owners
- =orgize-0.10.0-alpha.0.tgz= is built from the orgize-wasm package and the
  orgize checkout's HTML source-block metadata implementation.
- =poo-flow-runtime-wasm-0.1.0.tgz= is built from
  =poo-flow/bindings/runtime-wasm= and contains the typed workflow plan plus the
  compact WASM execution cursor.

* Promotion
After these exact packages are published, replace the file specifications with
immutable registry versions and retain package-lock integrity verification.
